title: Fuzzynettle
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Fuzzynettles.jpg|thumb|250px|Fuzzynettles.]]
The '''fuzzynettle''' was a [[Plant/Legends|plant]] native to the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]]. It was known to the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] to have medicinal properties. At one time, [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]] went out to retrieve a sample of the plant for the medicine man [[Logray/Legends|Logray]], who used it to create a medicine which helped cure [[Latara/Legends|Latara]] of a disease.

==Appearances==
*''[[Wicket Finds a Way: An Ewok Adventure]]'' {{1st}}
